params.SpellDescription: The next time you cast an instant or sorcery spell from your hand this turn, put that card into your hand instead of into your graveyard as it resolves.

remaining_params.SpellDescription: The next time you cast an instant or sorcery spell from your hand this turn, put that card into your hand instead of into your graveyard as it resolves.

params.Description: Instant and sorcery spells you control have lifelink.
